title: Prefix Sum
statement: Return the running prefix sums.
reference_solution:
def solve(nums):
                out = []
                total = 0
                for num in nums:
                    total += num
                    out.append(total)
                return out
problem_statement: Return the running prefix sums.

title: Matrix Trace
statement: Return the sum of the main diagonal.
reference_solution:
def solve(matrix):
                return sum(matrix[i][i] for i in range(min(len(matrix), len(matrix[0]))))
problem_statement: Return the sum of the main diagonal.
